---
agent: Instructions Generator
---

Take the information below and generate instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise generate an appropriate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference the new instructions file you created. If no information provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document. Always ask for clarification if the provided information is not sufficient to generate clear instructions.
